recent_calls.summary: The user called to follow up on a message about their claim. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent for further assistance and successfully transferred the call.

The user called to inquire about the arrival time of a service appointment scheduled for today. The agent confirmed the appointment details and informed the user that the technician Devon would arrive between 3:45 and 4:45 PM. The call ended with the user being transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Ruth Robinson, called to confirm her appointment for a central unit installation with Budget. The agent confirmed the appointment is scheduled for today between 10:45 AM and 11:45 AM with technician Devon. The user had no further questions and the call ended politely.

Angie from American Home Shield's authorization department called Budget to ask if a certain issue was a preexisting condition. The agent, Sophie, informed her that she could not determine that and assured Angie that the question would be passed to the appropriate team for follow-up. The call ended after confirming no further assistance was needed.

The user, Eric, called and requested to speak with Daniel and Nicole. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.

The user called to clarify that they want repairs done on their current air conditioning unit under their home warranty instead of replacing it, as previous estimates focused on replacement. The agent confirmed the user's details and assured that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly to assist with the repair. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Bernard called to request urgent service for his air conditioner, which has been waiting for over two weeks. The agent booked an appointment for the same day at 4 PM and confirmed the details with Bernard. Bernard provided feedback rating the experience as a 3, expressing frustration about the wait time but was satisfied with the booking.

Dana called to clarify an HVAC estimate she received by email, as she thought all work was completed during the last visit. The agent confirmed her details and arranged for a team member to call her back to explain the estimate. Dana declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Jim Lane called to confirm his appointment scheduled for today between 10 AM and noon. The agent confirmed the appointment details and informed Jim that the team would notify him of any changes. Jim expressed satisfaction with the service and did not request any updates or rescheduling.

Lee McMurray called to report that his furnace fan runs for a few minutes but does not warm the house. He is not in an emergency situation and requested a technician visit on Monday since he will be out of town tomorrow. The agent confirmed the details and informed Lee that a human agent will follow up to confirm the appointment.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to inquire about a $100 charge on their funeral policy. The agent apologized for not having direct access to billing information and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.

Roberta called to schedule a service appointment for her central air conditioner, which is not cooling, under her home warranty. The agent collected her details and informed her that a human agent would follow up to schedule the service. The agent also offered information about home maintenance programs.

James called to schedule a follow-up appointment for his air conditioning system under his American Home Shield home warranty. He requested a technician visit on Tuesday or Thursday, preferably in the morning. The agent confirmed the details and informed James that a human agent would contact him soon to finalize the appointment.

The user called regarding a service request related to their American Home Shield home warranty, specifically for their air conditioner. The agent attempted to gather details but the user requested to speak directly to a representative. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to speak with the person responsible for setting up e suites services with the city of Saint Charles. The agent gathered the user's name, phone number, and role, then transferred the call to the appropriate team for further assistance.

Sebastian Jones called to schedule a service appointment for his furnace, which is not turning on, through his home warranty. The agent confirmed the details and informed him that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him shortly. Sebastian declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user called to confirm a technician appointment scheduled for today between 8 and 10 AM. The agent verified the appointment details and confirmed the time window with the user. The user had no further questions and ended the call politely.

The user called Budget and was asked for their service address ZIP code but did not provide it. The user requested to speak to a representative, and the call was transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

Ellie from American Home Shield called to request a second opinion on an AC unit issue at a specific address. The agent confirmed the details and informed Ellie that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her soon. Ellie declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call.

Steve Williams called to report a water heater that was not getting hot and requested a service appointment. The agent booked an appointment for April 30, 2026, at 2 PM and confirmed the details with Steve. Steve provided positive feedback about the immediate response from the agent.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user called but quickly realized it was the wrong number and ended the call shortly after. The agent responded politely and the call ended without further interaction.

The user, Emma Bradley, called to inquire about an appointment but the agent could not find any appointment in the system. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the call was successfully transferred.

The user, Whitney, reported a serious furnace issue involving a gas leak that required fire department intervention. The agent confirmed details, documented the emergency, and assured Whitney that the team would prioritize the request and contact her as soon as possible on the next business day. The call ended with the user requesting immediate callback and no further issues raised.

William called to confirm that the wiring for his new central heating and air unit passed inspection and that no extra work was done. He provided his updated service address and preferred a phone call follow-up to clear up the concern. The agent confirmed the details, scheduled a callback, and received positive feedback from William about the professionalism of the service.

The user requested paperwork related to their American Home Shield home warranty for their air conditioning system. The agent confirmed the request and sought more details about the specific issue, but the call ended before completion.

The user, Donda, called to report a leaking HVAC system installed the previous day and requested a repair. She also wanted to schedule rewiring of the furnace for Friday morning, as it was the only day she could take off work. The agent documented the issues and arranged for a callback from a representative the next business day to assist with scheduling.

The user called to inquire about maintenance services for their heating and air conditioning system and asked about pricing. The agent explained that pricing varies and offered to have a representative follow up, but the user declined and said they would call back.

The user, Whitney, called to reschedule a plumbing appointment for a water heater flush as part of their maintenance plan. The agent successfully booked the appointment for May 5th at 10 AM and clarified the dispatch fee situation. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the agent asked for the user's service address ZIP code. The user did not provide any information before hanging up.
The agent greeted the user and asked for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The call was very brief, with the agent attempting to start the conversation by asking for the user's service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to discuss a recent invoice and was promptly transferred to the billing team for assistance. The agent explained they could not access billing information but ensured the user was connected to the appropriate department.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user returned a phone call and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent acknowledged the callback and facilitated the transfer without further interaction.
The agent greeted the user and asked for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called and was quickly transferred to a live customer service representative for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer promptly.
The user called and requested to speak with Cece. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to the appropriate person for further assistance.

The user called to inquire about replacing a gas pool heater for an in-ground pool and whether installation services are offered. The agent explained that they mainly handle HVAC and standard water heaters but offered to take the user's information for further review. The call ended shortly after without completing the information exchange.

The user, Kari, called to schedule routine maintenance through American Home Shield. The agent confirmed the details and informed Kari that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her shortly. Kari declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user called to inquire if O'Fallon, Missouri is within the service area for plumbing services. After confirming the location and service type, the agent transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user, Michael, called to return calls and set up an appointment. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for appointment scheduling.

The user, Reggie, called to inquire about becoming an executive member with the Better Business Bureau and requested to be connected with the appropriate contact person. The agent, Sophie, took down the user's contact information and assured that the request would be forwarded to the right team member. The call ended positively with the user expressing satisfaction and no further questions.

Jim Lane called to request a salt delivery and a technical service appointment for his water purification system due to strange noises and a flashing sensor box. The agent scheduled a service appointment for the next day at 10 AM and confirmed the details with Jim. Jim was satisfied with the quick and helpful service provided by the agent.
The agent attempted to engage the user by asking for their service address ZIP code, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after.

The user called to speak with an associate about an electrical wiring issue involving the wrong gauge wire installed on a unit. The agent confirmed it was not an emergency and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Roberta called to schedule a home warranty service appointment for her air conditioning system that is not cooling. The agent confirmed the details and scheduled the appointment for the next day, noting that Roberta did not have the dispatch number. Roberta declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
